_meta.note: Financeiro ontology — bootstrapped EMPTY from the fechamento-processos template (2026-06-10). The domain (entities/actions/business-rules/integrations/ui-flows/workflows) is modelled incrementally via the /feature-new pipeline; the OntologyCurator populates these collections per accepted feature. Until then they are empty BY DESIGN. The Conexos ERP integration is wired in code (src/backend/domain/client/ConexosClient.ts) but its ontology contract is (re)written on the first feature that touches it.

status_legend.implemented: code in src/ implements the entity/action under the target architecture
status_legend.partial: code exists but does not yet meet the target architecture (DDD, tsyringe, Lambda)
status_legend.planned-migration: ontology imported from upstream; local code does not implement it (yet) — track in migration-debt
